name: ASUS PRIME B860M-A WIFI-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8666+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 20Gbps Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASUS PRIME B860M-A WIFI-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: ASUS PRIME B860M-A WIFI-CSM Micro-ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5, and Wi-Fi 6E for Intel LGA 1851.
